entity.label: Gahar
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Lurking-place, one of the chief of the Nethinim, whose descendants returned to Jerusalem under Zerubbabel (Ezra 2:47).

nodes.label: Gahar
nodes.description: Lurking-place, one of the chief of the Nethinim, whose descendants returned to Jerusalem under Zerubbabel (Ezra 2:47).

verses.text: The children of Giddel, the children of Gahar, the children of Reaiah,
The children of Hanan, the children of Giddel, the children of Gahar,
